Accessibility Statement

Healthy eating made effortless

Meal-kit convenience. Grocery-store variety. Fully personalized to you.

Grocery shopping gets personal

01

It starts with a few questions

You tell us a little about your diet, health goals, and budget so we can build a plan designed for you.

02

We fill your cart for you

Every grocery item and recipe is picked to fit your preferences. Get ready for a lot more free time.

50,000+ recipes
03

Eat well all week long

The convenience of a meal kit with the variety of a grocery store gives you everything you need to eat healthy.

Real food. Real results.

  • “I started using Hungryroot for the convenience. I was pleasantly surprised that it not only lowered my stress but also improved my annual bloodwork!”

    - Ashley H.

  • “Hungryroot has helped us eat healthier. We have a more varied diet, with more veggies, and have definitely noticed a decrease in cravings, bloat and stomach issues. I've been able to lose weight and get back to my exercise routine too!”

    - Curry D.

  • “Fun to pick out dinners every week, lots of organic products, tasty meals.....and good portion size so we don't overeat!”

    - Sandy H.
